bullets.text: U.S.-Iran off-ramp uncertain; Trump threatens strikes on Iranian power plants if Hormuz not reopened, raising miscalculation risk and regional escalation.
Escalating contest over the Strait of Hormuz highlights vulnerability of a key oil-shipping chokepoint; sustained disruption could spike energy prices and marine insurance costs.
Iranian internet blackout during Nowruz underscores information-control tactics in conflict, degrading crisis communications and increasing domestic pressure and diaspora uncertainty.
DHS shutdown brinkmanship: Trump vows ICE deployments to airports; operational continuity and air-travel security remain sensitive to funding and political escalation.
Bipartisan talks to rein in immigration crackdown suggest congressional constraints, but DHS internal power dynamics point to increasingly politicized enforcement.
Mueller’s death reopens debate over Russia-investigation findings and deepens partisan conflict, reinforcing perceptions of U.S. institutional polarization.
Media pressure on Pentagon to restore access after a court ruling raises transparency and accountability stakes amid conflict and defense-spending scrutiny.
Ultra-potent drugs shifting to paper-like carriers complicate interdiction and raise overdose risk, implying higher long-run public-health and enforcement costs.
Equities fall for a fourth straight week; Russell 2000 enters correction, signaling tighter financial conditions and growth anxiety even as oil shocks may matter less than assumed.
IRS 2026 rule changes plus rising ‘tax resistance’ rhetoric heighten compliance and penalty risks; households may need to recalibrate withholding and estimated payments.
‘OpenClaw’ moment fuels concern foundation AI models are commoditizing; durable advantage shifts to proprietary data, distribution, and specialized workflows, pressuring vendor margins.
Biomed advances: AI predicts cancer spread, engineered probiotics target tumors, and a new pill cuts LDL ~60%—potentially reshaping oncology and cardiometabolic drug markets.
